fields.name: action denied string#A string to display when someone else is already using "interaction held"-type controls
action denied secondary string#A string displayed when someone else is using "interaction held"-type controls and it's in secondary mode
MP team use denied string#A string to display if the reason for denial is because of the MP team use restriction
MP team use denied secondary string#A string displayed if denied because of MP team use restriction and in secondary mode
action and MP team use denied string#Displayed when someone else already using "interaction held"-type controls and that player's team also triggers the mp use restriction
action and MP team use denied secondary string#Displayed when "interaction held"-type controls in use, the MP use restriction applies, and in secondary mode
interaction hold time#How many seconds the user must hold the interaction button before the control triggers:seconds
interaction screen#A cui_screen to display when someone is using "interaction held"-type controls
hold start#An effect to play when a user starts holding the interaction button on this control
action denied sound#A sound to play when someone attempts to use this control while it is in use

options:
health station#touching this device plays the 'on' effect set below and refills the unit's health.
It also deletes itself if it runs out of charges (set in sapien)
